_comment: Rights ROLES — assign ONE to each person via WIKIJS_PROFILES ("role": "..."). A role lists category modes (allow | confirm | block) and/or per-tool overrides, and may `extends` another role (inherit + override). The graduated ladder below goes from 'leser' (read-only) up to 'systemadmin' (everything). Categories: read, write, delete, manage_users, manage_groups, manage_system, manage_auth. NOTE: a role can only grant up to the global ceiling WIKIJS_PERMISSION_PRESET (set that to your most-privileged role). Edit freely; on Vercel REDEPLOY to apply (bundled at build), or override at runtime via the WIKIJS_ROLES env var (same JSON). `defaultRole` is used for the ceiling and for entries without a role. The 'wiki' role is the default overlay for OAuth sessions (WIKIJS_OAUTH_ROLE): access control itself lives in Wiki.js (the user's real groups/page-rules), this server only keeps confirm gates on destructive/admin actions.
